subject: double
body:
I've been working like a normal person for the past year. I just incorporated the new company to do private travel matchmaking for extraordinary people. I would be curious to hear what you think about the new refined business model. You are also welcome to participate when you need a ride.
Do you intend to honor the double income deal or have you changed your mind? 


Nadia
